## What Does This PR Do?

Brief description of your changes. What problem does this solve or what feature does it add?

## Why Are We Doing This?

Explain the motivation. What was broken or missing? Link to any related issues here (e.g., "Fixes #42" or "Relates to #38").

## How Did You Test This?

Tell us how you verified this works:
- [ ] Tested on Windows / macOS / Linux (pick one or more)
- [ ] Ran the app and manually verified the change works
- [ ] Added or updated unit tests
- [ ] Tested edge cases (e.g., files with unusual characters, missing subtitles, etc.)
- [ ] Dry run encoding still works
- [ ] All existing tests still pass

**Specific test steps:**
```
1. ...
2. ...
```

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style and conventions
- [ ] I've added tests for new functionality (if applicable)
- [ ] I've updated documentation if needed (README, wiki, docstrings)
- [ ] All tests pass locally
- [ ] My changes work on the platform(s) I could test
- [ ] No new dependencies added (or discussed beforehand)
- [ ] Commits have clear, descriptive messages

## Screenshots or Logs (if applicable)

If you changed the GUI, added a screenshot. If there's relevant console output or error messages, paste them in a code block.

## Any Concerns or Notes for Reviewers?

Anything you want the reviewer to pay special attention to? Any known limitations or future improvements?

---

Thanks for contributing! 🎬
